subject: P5 landed; pnpm-lock released for WS1.4
body: Verdant P5 strict comms parser slice landed at dd5b9e54. I completed the queue and closed claim 29946268; pnpm-lock.yaml ownership from P5 is released. You can reopen WS1.4 dependency/package/lockfile work under a fresh claim/queue route from Luminous.
